description: Merge conflict resolved at tier auto-resolve. Branch: overstory/build-cache-fix/behavior-tree-ist-5aac. Agent: build-cache-fix. Conflicting files: .mulch/mulch.config.yaml.

name: pure-state-updater
description: State updater functions must be pure — no side effects (localStorage, fetch, etc.) inside setState(prev => ...). Move side effects to useEffect that depends on the state value.

name: displayState-dedup
description: BehaviourTree caches last JSON.stringify(state) per nodeId; emits state in TickTraceEvent only when serialized value changes. TickStore.getSnapshotAtTick fills missing state via getLastNodeState(nodeId, tickId) (carry-forward). Avoids wire traffic for unchanged node states.

title: WHI-10 mutable trees runtime design
rationale: Owner answered all 8 open questions from research phase

name: bidirectional-ring-buffer
description: RingBuffer unshift/unshiftMany prepend to oldest end, evict from newest end. When batch >= capacity, keeps newest capacity items (mirroring pushMany). TickStore.insertBefore uses unshiftMany; evicted are always previously-stored ticks (not batch overflows). TreeInspector.insertTicksBefore does NOT increment totalTickCount — historical loads are separate from live tick count.

name: use-tick-poller-windowed
description: useTickPoller signature: (selection, pollRateMs, windowSize, mode: 'streaming'|'windowed'). Returns {ticks, latestBackwardTicks, isLoading, error, fetchBefore, seekToRange}. streaming mode auto-polls forward; windowed mode only fetches on explicit fetchBefore/seekToRange calls. fetchBefore prepends + evicts newest; seekToRange replaces window. use-studio-controls.ts needs update when integrating (breaking API change from TickRecord[]).

content: Windowed time travel UI: StudioControls exposes tickBounds (StudioTickBounds={minTickId,maxTickId,totalCount}), onFetchTicksAround(tickId), isLoadingWindow. useTimeTravelControls accepts options.{onNeedTick,serverBounds,isLoading}. TimelinePanel uses serverBounds for scrubber min/max and shows 'Loaded: N/M ticks' text. BehaviourTreeDebugger wires: handleNeedTick→studioControls.onFetchTicksAround. use-studio-controls polls ticks.bounds every 5s and implements onFetchTicksAround via ticks.range fetch merged into extraTicks state.

useInspector bidirectional insert: tracks ingestedTickIdsRef as Set<number> (not lastIngestedTickId scalar). Forward ticks (tickId > newestStored) go via ingestTicks(). Backward ticks (tickId <= newestStored) go via inspector.insertTicks?.(records) optional-chained — no-op until data-layer builder adds TreeInspector.insertTicks().

StudioUiSettings windowed fields: windowSize (default 1000, target ticks loaded for time travel) and fetchBatchSize (default 1000, ticks per windowed request). Both persisted in localStorage via use-ui-settings.ts. SettingsPanel renders both as NumberField with min=100.
